name: LexisNexis Legal Research & Data API
what_it_does: LexisNexis REST APIs for legal research, risk data, and analytics. Enables AI agents to manage legal research queries against comprehensive case law, statutes, and regulations database for legal intelligence, handle Shepard's citation service retrieval for case validity and precedent verification, access legal analytics data including judge, court, and motion outcome data for litigation strategy, retrieve court filing and docket data for case monitoring and litigation tracking, handle background check and identity verification data via LexisNexis Risk Solutions for KYC and fraud prevention, access public records and asset data for due diligence automation, retrieve news and business intelligence data for legal and compliance monitoring, manage legal entity data and corporate structure retrieval for regulatory compliance, handle vehicle and property history data via CLUE for insurance, and integrate legal research and risk data with legal practice management and compliance platforms.
use_cases: Researching case law from legal intelligence agents
Verifying case precedent from litigation strategy agents
Checking identity and risk from KYC compliance agents
Monitoring litigation dockets from legal operations agents
not_for: Non-legal applications without licensed legal database need
Consumer background checks without FCRA-compliant use case
Cost-sensitive applications where per-search pricing is prohibitive
best_when: A law firm, corporate legal department, insurance carrier, or financial institution using LexisNexis wants AI agents to automate legal research, citation validation, litigation analytics, KYC background checks, and docket monitoring.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: LexisNexis Risk Solutions background check and identity data is subject to FCRA — automated adverse employment or credit decisions based on LexisNexis data without FCRA-compliant adverse action process creates consumer protection violations. Legal research results require attorney review before use in legal proceedings; automated legal conclusions from API results without counsel validation create professional liability. Case law currency — LexisNexis database is comprehensive but verify jurisdiction coverage for less common courts.

auth.notes: LexisNexis uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes for API access. Separate credentials for Legal (research) and Risk Solutions (background check) products. Developer portal at developer.lexisnexis.com. New York, New York HQ. Part of RELX Group (LSE/NYSE: RELX). LexisNexis Legal comprises legal research (Lexis Advance) and analytics products. LexisNexis Risk Solutions comprises identity, fraud, and public records data. Webhooks for docket monitoring. Strong competition with Thomson Reuters Westlaw for legal research market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-search or subscription licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription or per-search pricing; Risk Solutions per-query pricing
pricing.notes: New York, New York. RELX Group (RELX NYSE/LSE). $8B+ annual revenue. Legal research: 49B+ legal documents. Risk Solutions: 78B public records, 500M+ identity records. Two distinct businesses: LexisNexis Legal (law firms, corporate counsel) and LexisNexis Risk Solutions (insurance, financial services, government). Competes with Thomson Reuters (Westlaw) for legal research. Risk Solutions competes with TransUnion, Equifax for identity and risk data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; subscription tier dependent

known_agent_gotchas: FCRA consumer protection risk — LexisNexis Risk Solutions background check data is FCRA-regulated; automated adverse decisions (employment, credit, housing) require FCRA adverse action notice and permissible purpose

Legal vs. Risk Solutions credential separation — LexisNexis Legal (research) and Risk Solutions (background check) have different API products, credentials, and compliance requirements; separate them carefully
Legal research currency — case law database is comprehensive but not real-time; very recent decisions (last 24-48 hours) may have indexing lag; verify currency for time-sensitive research
Shepard's citation integration — Shepard's citators must be used alongside case law; automated case citation without Shepard's validity check creates risk of citing overruled precedent
Attorney review requirement — legal research API results support attorney analysis; automated legal conclusions from API data without counsel review create professional responsibility exposure
Jurisdiction coverage gaps — less common court jurisdictions may have incomplete coverage; verify jurisdiction-specific coverage before relying on API for comprehensive research
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal research and risk data. SOC2, ISO27001, FCRA, GLBA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Case law, identity, and public records data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal and risk data. SOC2, FCRA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Case law and identity data.
